commands.review_summary:
The PR resolves plugin config `${ENV_VAR}` placeholders during shared runtime and gateway plugin loading, and adds focused regression coverage for those paths.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +85. Total +96 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the merge blocker: source and tests show `$${VAR}` is a single-pass escape, and this PR adds a second resolveConfigEnvVars pass in runtime/gateway paths. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
